meta.source: HUD CHAS sumlevel-140 (tract) aggregated to place via Census Geocoder centroid containment
meta.note: Tracts are assigned to a single place by centroid containment (Geocoder layers: Incorporated Places + Census Designated Places). Tracts with centroid in unincorporated land contribute to no place. Coverage field shows tracted-place renter HH ÷ county renter HH.
